prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 56 名，近年排名稳定，政法类院校中唯一 A+ 法学学科；2026 年声誉偏负面（校园安全事件），但抖音热度总排名第 6（高热），法学类内容传播广泛；2024 年内蒙古理科法学曾出现投档线暴跌，但陕西物理类未见明显断档记录；法学 A+（全国唯一），物理类招生含法学、法学实验班、金融双学士学位等，学科吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业热度 2024 年为「分化观望」，整体偏热但内部劝退增多；陕西省 2026 年物理类考生约 206500 人，较 2025 年（172468 人）增长约 19.7%，考生基数大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；该校位于北京，对陕西考生属跨省报考，无本地倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、 2026 年计划扩招（+14.3%）、本省物理类考生大幅增加（+19.7%）、抖音高热维持关注度等因素，考生增幅显著大于扩招幅度，竞争压力上升；，结合考生规模增长做小幅上修，预测最低位次约 9150 名，区间 8650–9650 名。

- 法学（金融双学士学位项目）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 8650–9650 名内，建议以二档法学、数据法学实验班为主攻方向，一档实验班法学作为冲刺，三档应用心理学、经济学作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<8650 名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>9650 名）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 4391 → 18487 → 7769 → 9256 → 8390, with an abnormal large drop in 2022 (18487), stabilizing between 7769 and 9256 from 2023 to 2025, with a baseline of about 8390 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi for Physics Category (formerly Science) was: 22 in 2021, 22 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 17 in 2024, 21 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24, an increase of 3 (+14.3%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, approximately 56th in 2026, with stable rankings in recent years, the only A+ law discipline among political science and law universities; reputation in 2026 is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), but overall Douyin popularity ranks 6th (high heat), with widespread dissemination of law-related content; in 2024, there was a sharp drop in the admission score line for law in Inner Mongolia Science category, but no obvious gap records in Shaanxi Physics Category; law is A+ (the only one nationwide), and Physics Category enrollment includes law, law experimental class, finance dual degree programs, etc., with strong disciplinary appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity in 2024 was 'differentiated wait-and-see', overall hot but with increasing internal discouragement; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 2025 (172,468), with a significant increase in the examinee base, leading to intensified competition; the university is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial application for Shaanxi examinees, with no local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, the 2026 enrollment expansion (+14.3%), the significant increase in local Physics Category examinees (+19.7%), and the sustained attention from high Douyin popularity, the increase in examinees is significantly greater than the expansion, leading to increased competitive pressure; with a slight upward adjustment based on the growth in examinee numbers, the predicted minimum ranking is about 9150, with a range of 8650–9650.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8650–9650, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 law and data law experimental class as main targets, with Tier 1 experimental class law as a reach, and Tier 3 applied psychology and economics as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<8650), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>9650), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as supplementary.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 368, 416, 859, 603, and 462, showing a fluctuating upward trend. In 2023, there was a significant drop (859th place), but it recovered in 2024–2025, though still higher than the 2021–2022 levels. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 462. The university's enrollment plan for History Category (formerly Liberal Arts) in Shaanxi: 23 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 31 in 2024, 39 in 2025, with continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 43, an increase of 4 (+10.3%) from 2025, showing a clear expansion trend, easing competition pressure, but rankings may still rise due to the larger candidate pool.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science main list, stable in the 50–56 range in recent years, making it a top-tier political science and law institution. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), but it ranks 6th in overall Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure and widespread dissemination of law-related content, maintaining high application interest. In 2024, there was a sharp drop in the admission score line for law in Inner Mongolia's science category, but no significant gaps were recorded for Shaanxi's History Category. Law is rated A+ (the only one nationwide), directly corresponding to all law-related majors at this university, with strong subject strength attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the law major in 2024 is described as 'differentiated wait-and-see,' still relatively hot overall, but with increasing internal voices of discouragement. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Shaanxi is about 88,500, an increase of about 17% from 2025 (75,641), intensifying competition due to the larger candidate base. The university is located in Beijing, so for Shaanxi candidates, it is an inter-provincial application with no local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuations in historical rankings, the continued expansion of the 2026 plan (+10.3%), the significant increase in local History Category candidates (+17%), and the sustained high attention on Douyin, the expansion and candidate growth offset each other, but the candidate growth rate exceeds the expansion rate, so competition is expected to slightly intensify. Combined with the increase in candidate scale, a small upward adjustment is made, predicting a minimum ranking of about 500, with a range of 410–590.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<410), you can aim for the top-tier experimental classes. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>590), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as supplementary.
